meaning: adj.受到影响的,受(疾病)侵袭的,假装的,做作的
examples: The disease has affected her sight.
This has profoundly affected my life.
The affected skin turns red and may blister.
Labour leader Ed Miliband called for a "rapid response" from the government to help affected communities.
The charity has responded to disasters in Louisiana, Oklahoma, Haiti and areas affected by Superstorm Sandy.
